testcase.name: AuthLandingPage > renders login and sign up options for unauthenticated users
testcase.system-err: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_starttransition. ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: Relative route resolution within Splat routes is changing in v7. You can use the `v7_relativeSplatPath` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_relativesplatpath.

testcase.name: NewWorkoutPage > shows a validation error when name is empty
NewWorkoutPage > shows a validation error when date is empty
NewWorkoutPage > saves to localStorage and navigates to /pending without calling the API
SignupPage > signs up and navigates to workouts

testcase.name: WorkoutDetailPage > creates a new exercise for the owner
WorkoutDetailPage > deletes the workout and navigates to the list
WorkoutDetailPage > shows an error when workout deletion fails
WorkoutDetailPage > populates the exercise form when clicking Edit on an exercise
WorkoutDetailPage > resets the exercise form when Cancel Edit is clicked
WorkoutDetailPage > updates an existing exercise after clicking Edit
WorkoutDetailPage > deletes an exercise from the workout
WorkoutDetailPage > shows an error when exercise deletion fails
WorkoutDetailPage > resets the form when deleting the exercise currently being edited
WorkoutDetailPage > submits a cardio exercise with duration and speed
WorkoutDetailPage — pending mode > redirects to /new when no pending workout is in localStorage
WorkoutDetailPage — pending mode > shows workout name and exercise form when localStorage has pending data
WorkoutDetailPage — pending mode > calls createWorkoutWithExercise and navigates to the saved workout on first exercise submit
WorkoutsPage > renders workout list from API

testcase.name: WorkoutsPage > renders empty state when there are no workouts
WorkoutsPage > redirects invalid page param to page 1
api service > validates login payload before calling API
api service > calls login endpoint for valid payload
api service > returns null for 401 current user lookup
api service > throws non-401 errors for current user lookup
api service > maps workout list response
api service > creates workout then fetches details
api service > updates workout then fetches details
api service > creates exercise then fetches workout details
api service > updates exercise then fetches workout details
api service > deletes exercise then fetches workout details
